name: Command
description: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. Choose the command from these options: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel (Prone), or Halt. Engine: the forced behaviour is descriptive only — the save is rolled, but the AI compulsion isn't modelled.
scaling: You can affect one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.
